entity_assignment_table.members_sample: Organization: [Condominium Association, Entity made up of the unit owners responsible for the maintenance and operation of common elements owned in undivided shares by unit owners and other buildings in which the unit owners have use rights, FEMA, Insurer]
Person: [You, Mortgagee, Named Insured(s), Includes Trustee, Policyholder...]
Coverage: [total building insurance coverage, Coverage A, Coverage B, Coverage C—Other Coverages, Pollution Damage...]
Property: [PROP-0c1c33332514, PROP-2c646210fb03, PROP-fbd085708541, PROP-00746a56c159, PROP-d82c72126a0c...]
Material: [NFIP Insurance, Sandbags, Supplies, and Labor, Flood Insurance, Materials and Supplies for Construction, Non-Owned Debris...]
Process: [Cancellation, Ending of the insurance coverage provided by this policy before the expiration date, Debris Removal, Loss Avoidance Measures, Property Removed to Safety...]

Structure: [Basement, Building, Condominium, Any area of a building, including any sunken room or sunken portion of a room, having its floor below ground level on all sides, Structure with two or more outside rigid walls and a fully secured roof that is affixed to a permanent site...]
Requirement: [Repetitive Loss Building, Conservation Easement, Compliance with Floodplain Management Laws, Exceeding Minimum Standards, Review Information...]

Deductible: [Fixed amount of an insured loss that is your responsibility and that is incurred by you before any amounts are paid for the insured loss under this policy, Separate Deductible, The least of the following amounts after application of the deductible]
Payment: [Paid Full Amount, Pay Cost of Replacement Minus Depreciation, Proportional Payment, Lesser of Two Amounts, Negotiated Salvage Payment]
Claim: [Previous Qualifying Claim, Insured Loss ≥ Policy Limits + Deductible, Covered Loss Before Policy Ends, Total Loss Claim]

Damage: [Flood, Direct Physical Loss By or From Flood, General and temporary condition of partial or complete inundation, Loss or damage to insured property directly caused by flood, Damage Caused by Pollutants...]
Risk: [Earth Movement, Base Flood, Flood having a one percent chance of being equaled or exceeded in any given year, Earthquake, Landslide...]

Exclusion: [Water, Moisture, Mildew, or Mold Damage, Within Your Control, Water or Waterborne Material Backup, Design, Structural, or Mechanical Defects, Failures, Stoppages, or Breakage of Water or Sewer Lines...]
Deadline: [Policy Term Ends Before 90 Days, 12:01 a.m. on the last day of the policy term]
Limit: [Maximum building claim payout under NFIP policy, Coverage A and B Limits, $1,000, $10,000, $30,000]
